question: To adjust the refrigerator's temperature, which keys on the touchscreen need to be pressed?
gt_answer: To adjust the refrigerator temperature, you typically need to first unlock it: Unlock: Tap the "Mode Lock" icon (lock symbol) at the bottom of the screen to unlock the state. Select the adjustment area: If adjusting the "Refrigerator" temperature, tap the area near "04℃" or the text "Refrigerator". If adjusting the "Variable Temperature Compartment" temperature, tap the area near "-06℃" or the text "Variable Temperature Compartment". If adjusting the "Freezer" temperature, tap the area near "-15℃" or the text "Freezer". Adjust the temperature: After touching the corresponding area, follow the prompts to increase or decrease the temperature (some refrigerators allow adjustment by tapping numbers or swiping up or down). Pay attention to the screen feedback during operation. Once the desired temperature is reached, some refrigerators will automatically lock; if not, you can re-tap the "Mode Lock" to manually lock the setting.
